title: Birodh
subTitle: An inspector posted in a remote village area tries to fight against the corrupt local MLA. However, the MLA responds pettily by spreading lies about him.

title: Bhagya Debata
subTitle: Jagadish Mondal, an honest commoner, fights against the unjust practices, corruption and crime prevalent in society in a bid to help the poor and needy, while also taking care of his family.

title: Yoddha
subTitle: A woman finds herself in a dilemma when she is forced to marry a wealthy criminal by her family. To escape the marriage, she decides to elope with her lover.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
subTitle: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Asha-O-Bhalobasa
subTitle: Bijoy is jailed after being framed by Bilas Dutta, a famous businessman, and unable to deal with it, his sister commits suicide. When he is released from prison, Bijoy vows to seek revenge.

title: Badnam
subTitle: Mathur Ghosh's cruelty drives Haranath to suicide. Years later, Haranath's son Shankar grows up determined to avenge his father's death by seeking justice against the evil Mathur Ghosh.

title: Tomai Pabo Bole
subTitle: Two neighbouring families are embroiled in a bitter rivalry. However, in an interesting turn of events, the son of one family falls in love with the daughter of the other.

title: Suorani Duorani
subTitle: The king of Kishangarh marries a girl, unaware that she is a demoness. Upon learning the truth about his stepmother, the prince decides to save his father and their kingdom from her evil plans.

title: Pratham Dekha
subTitle: Two struggling singers, who hope to make their way to the top, fall in love and fight to stay together amidst various societal barriers.

title: Bandie
subTitle: Unable to conceive an heir, Maharaja Brajbhan and his wife are forced to abdicate the throne for his cousin, Vikram. Chaos ensues when Vikram learns that the queen is pregnant and decides to kill her.

title: Shikarpur
subTitle: When a series of mysterious murders terrorise the hill town of Shikarpur, a small-time detective decides to solve the mystery and find the killer.

title: Jodidar
subTitle: Ganesh, an elephant, watches his master being killed by three poachers. After many years, Ganesh can identify the killers while being in the service of a new master, Munna.

title: Teen Murti
subTitle: Nabin, Nagen and Naren, three retired men, are the best of friends. Soon, they decide to revive an old tea shop and make some profits.

title: Pradhan
subTitle: When an honest policeman is transferred to Dharmapur, he encounters widespread corruption and fights to stay true to his principles.

title: Bachchan
subTitle: Bachchan, a huge fan of Amitabh Bachchan, falls in love with a colonel's daughter and tries to woo her. Later, he finds a mobile which belongs to a ruthless gangster and starts blackmailing him.

title: Projapati
subTitle: A 65-year-old retired widower, living alone with his son Joy, hopes he will marry to ease his loneliness. However, Joy, a busy wedding planner, has no plans to settle down anytime soon.

title: Boss 2
subTitle: Surya travels to Bangkok to seek revenge against the goons who tricked him and looted the people's money kept in his bank.

title: Switzerland
subTitle: Shibu and Rumi lead a middle-class family life with their children and can only afford to go to local destinations for holidays. One day, they decide to save money for a trip to Switzerland.

title: Tor Naam
subTitle: Tor Naam is a sweet teenage love story which begins in a boarding school in Sikkim and ends with an interesting twist.

title: Bhalobasar Jeet
